notes: startup logos are shown and then when the main menu should apear there is a blank white screen but you can hear the sound and you can as it sounds get ingame in the background but the while blank screen won't disappear. using the fake d3d9.dll the game crashes after the logos my guess is that this game like the other dust games also relies on resource sharing which is not really needed in previous titles but causes the crash in this one
title: Atelier Lulua ~The Scion of Arland~ / ルルアのアトリエ ～アーランドの錬金術士４～

notes:
Play ~10 mins till having the first chance to save. Everything works fine including my XB1 controller. No tweaks needed.

Note: The game window is not in the right place but I believe this is due to I'm using Gnome on Wayland instead of conventional Gnome on Xorg. So I mark this game as Platinum instead of Silver.
